dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: Both the rules-context-loader and the current-architecture-state-generator spans successfully passed schema validation. This indicates full adherence to the structural and governance constraints defined in the prompt schemas, a significant improvement over the baseline failure.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The agent processed a substantial context (39,691 prompt tokens) and generated a detailed architectural state (3,654 completion tokens). The successful completion of the reasoning chain without the previous JSON parse failures suggests a deep and coherent causal mapping.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The successful generation of the architecture state, which requires resolving trade-offs and identifying tension points, indicates that the agent successfully reached and completed the analysis phase that was previously blocked by structural errors.
